MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Justin Banderra
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Robert Bowman, is present.
Attorney, Aaron Farmer , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-21-2010 is vacated.
